question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Settle the week
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Test?

new_queue.label: Decision drag
new_queue.name: Where are you waiting on decisions that are slowing you down?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder landings
new_queue.name: How have your updates been landing with the people who rely on them?

new_queue.label: Trade-offs now
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do right now?

new_queue.label: Quiet drag
new_queue.name: What part of your work feels like it's costing more than it should?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?

new_queue.label: Recovery check
new_queue.name: Since we last spoke, where has your energy been going up or down?

new_queue.label: Ownership edge
new_queue.name: Where are you taking the lead more than you were a month ago?

new_queue.label: Scope pressure
new_queue.name: What feels most crowded in your plate right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
